strength: You already know the shape of a comment: you set out points on both sides and close with your own view. Your point about time even comes with a real example, which is the model to follow for the rest.

observations.text: This argument counts in full because it has a claim, a reason and an example all together.
observations.quote: It saves time, for example the morning report is ready faster now.

observations.text: Joining two short ideas into one sentence, as you did here, adds flow; try it a few more times.
observations.quote: It can reduce errors and make the work easier.

nextStep: Pick one of your points against AI and add a reason and a short example, so it becomes a complete argument like your point about time.
practice: Take the sentence 'Data protection is also a topic' and grow it into three sentences: a claim, a reason, and an example.
